values.content: You are a hospitality business intelligence analyst specializing in guest sentiment analysis for resorts. You analyze guest feedback with precision and return ONLY valid JSON. No explanations, no markdown, no code blocks. Return raw JSON only.

nodes.name: Log KB Leaks to PendingFAQ Sheet

parameters.text:
=🚩 *KNOWLEDGE BASE ALERT*

❓ *Repeated Question:* "{{$json.question}}"

_{{$json.suggestedAnswer}}_
